testcase.name: runScenario["Run JMeter performance test", "Performance Testing"](1)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Run JMeter performance test &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/jmeter.feature:3&amp#27;[0m WARN StatusConsoleListener The use of package scanning to locate plugins is deprecated and will be removed in a future release WARN StatusConsoleListener The use of package scanning to locate plugins is deprecated and will be removed in a future release WARN StatusConsoleListener The use of package scanning to locate plugins is deprecated and will be removed in a future release WARN StatusConsoleListener The use of package scanning to locate plugins is deprecated and will be removed in a future release Creating summariser <summary> Created the tree successfully using D:\cucumber-jmeter-framework\testplan.jmx Starting standalone test @ 2026 Apr 18 13:56:29 IST (1776500789850) Waiting for possible Shutdown/StopTestNow/HeapDump/ThreadDump message on port 4445 summary + 1 in 00:00:02 = 0.4/s Avg: 1957 Min: 1957 Max: 1957 Err: 0 (0.00%) Active: 4 Started: 5 Finished: 1 summary + 9 in 00:00:03 = 3.0/s Avg: 981 Min: 717 Max: 1712 Err: 0 (0.00%) Active: 0 Started: 10 Finished: 10 summary = 10 in 00:00:05 = 1.9/s Avg: 1078 Min: 717 Max: 1957 Err: 0 (0.00%) Tidying up ... @ 2026 Apr 18 13:56:35 IST (1776500795344) ... end of run &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI execute JMeter test&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.JMeterSteps.runTest()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mresponse time should be below &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m5000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m ms&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.JMeterSteps.validatePerformance(int)&amp#27;[0m Scenario: Run JMeter performance test
